---
title: "DEGgo RNA-seq Report"
author: "DEGgo"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    theme: flatly
    self_contained: true
params:
  results: NULL
  sig_deg: NULL
  go_results: NULL
  summary: NULL
  metadata: NULL
  output_dir: NULL
---
  
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

res <- params$results
results <- res
outdir <- params$output_dir %||% res$output_dir

if (is.null(outdir) || is.na(outdir)) {
  outdir <- getwd()
}

outdir <- normalizePath(outdir, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)


md <- res$metadata
sig <- res$sig_deg
go <- res$go_results
sumtab <- res$summary

html_escape <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- gsub("&", "&amp;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("<", "&lt;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub(">", "&gt;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub('"', "&quot;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x
}

html_card <- function(title, value, subtitle = NULL) {
  cat(
    '<div class="metric-card">',
    '<div class="metric-title">', html_escape(title), '</div>',
    '<div class="metric-value">', html_escape(value), '</div>',
    if (!is.null(subtitle)) {
      paste0('<div class="metric-subtitle">', html_escape(subtitle), '</div>')
    } else {
      ''
    },
    '</div>'
  )
}

show_table <- function(x, n = 20) {
  x <- as.data.frame(x, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  if (!nrow(x)) {
    cat("<p><em>No table content available.</em></p>")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  
  if (is.finite(n)) {
    x <- utils::head(x, n)
  }
  
  print(
    knitr::kable(
      x,
      format = "html",
      row.names = FALSE,
      escape = FALSE,
      table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover table-condensed'"
    )
  )
  
  invisible(NULL)
}

safe_list_png <- function(path, pattern = "\\.png$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = FALSE) {
  if (is.null(path) || length(path) == 0 || anyNA(path) || !dir.exists(path[1])) {
    return(character(0))
  }

  list.files(
    path = path[1],
    pattern = pattern,
    full.names = full.names,
    recursive = recursive
  )
}


find_png <- function(path) {
  safe_list_png(
    path = path,
    pattern = "\\.png$",
    full.names = TRUE,
    recursive = TRUE
  )
}


find_first_dir <- function(paths) {
  paths <- paths[!is.na(paths)]
  paths <- paths[dir.exists(paths)]
  
  if (!length(paths)) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }
  
  paths[1]
}

clean_title <- function(x) {
  x <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(x))
  x <- gsub("_", " ", x)
  x <- gsub("Volcano Plot", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("GO terms", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("Heatmap", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("Sample Correlation", "Sample correlation", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("Hierarchical Clustering", "Hierarchical clustering", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  trimws(x)
}

figure_badge <- function(f) {
  b <- basename(f)
  
  if (grepl("Correlation|Clustering|QC|Library|Detected", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("QC")
  if (grepl("PCA", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("PCA")
  if (grepl("Volcano", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("Volcano")
  if (grepl("Heatmap", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("Heatmap")
  if (grepl("GO", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("GO")
  
  "Figure"
}


html_img_src <- function(f) {
  f <- normalizePath(f, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
  paste0("file://", f)
}


emit_gallery <- function(files) {
  files <- files[file.exists(files)]

  if (length(files) == 0) {
    cat("<p><em>No plot found.</em></p>")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  cat('<div class="figure-grid">')

  for (f in sort(files)) {
    title <- clean_title(f)
    badge <- figure_badge(f)
    img_src <- html_img_src(f)

    cat('<div class="figure-card">')
    cat('<div class="figure-header">')
    cat('<span class="figure-badge">', badge, '</span>')
    cat('<h3>', title, '</h3>')
    cat('</div>')
    cat('<img src="', img_src, '" class="figure-img">')
    cat('</div>')
  }

  cat('</div>')

  invisible(NULL)
}


plot_gallery_grid <- function(files, badge = "Figure") {
  files <- files[file.exists(files)]

  if (length(files) == 0) {
    cat("<p><em>No figures found.</em></p>")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  cat('<div class="figure-grid">')

  for (f in sort(files)) {
    nm <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(f))
    nm <- gsub("_", " ", nm)
    img_src <- html_img_src(f)

    cat(
      '<div class="figure-card">',
      '<div class="figure-header">',
      '<span class="figure-badge">', badge, '</span>',
      '<h3>', nm, '</h3>',
      '</div>',
      '<img class="figure-img" src="', img_src, '" alt="', nm, '">',
      '</div>',
      sep = ""
    )
  }

  cat("</div>")

  invisible(NULL)
}


describe_output <- function(x) {
  out <- rep("DEGgo output file or folder", length(x))

  out[grepl("results$", x)] <- "Full differential expression results"
  out[grepl("significant$", x)] <- "Significant DEGs only"
  out[grepl("GO$", x)] <- "GO enrichment tables"
  out[grepl("GO_plots$", x)] <- "GO enrichment visualizations"
  out[grepl("heatmaps$", x)] <- "DEG heatmaps"
  out[grepl("PCA$", x)] <- "Sample-level PCA plots"
  out[grepl("volcano$", x)] <- "Volcano plots"
  out[grepl("QC$|qc$", x)] <- "Sample QC plots and clustering"
  out[grepl("reproducibility$", x)] <- "Clean inputs and run parameters"
  out[grepl("summary\\.tsv$", x)] <- "Summary of all comparisons"
  out[grepl("sessionInfo\\.txt$", x)] <- "Reproducibility and software versions"

  out
}


```

<style>
body {
font-size: 14px;
background: #fafafa;
}

h1, h2, h3 {
font-weight: 700;
}

h1 {
margin-top: 36px;
border-bottom: 3px solid #00876C;
padding-bottom: 8px;
}

h2 {
margin-top: 28px;
}

.metric-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
gap: 14px;
margin: 20px 0;
}

.metric-card {
background: white;
padding: 18px;
border-radius: 16px;
border: 1px solid #e6e6e6;
box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
}

.metric-title {
color: #666;
font-size: 13px;
font-weight: 700;
text-transform: uppercase;
}

.metric-value {
font-size: 25px;
font-weight: 800;
margin-top: 8px;
color: #111;
}

.metric-subtitle {
color: #777;
margin-top: 6px;
font-size: 12px;
}

.figure-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(360px, 1fr));
gap: 24px;
margin-top: 20px;
}

.figure-card {
background: white;
border: 1px solid #e6e6e6;
border-radius: 18px;
padding: 16px;
box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.07);
}

.figure-header {
margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.figure-header h3 {
font-size: 16px;
margin: 8px 0 0 0;
line-height: 1.25;
}

.figure-badge {
display: inline-block;
padding: 4px 11px;
border-radius: 999px;
background: #00876C;
color: white;
font-size: 12px;
font-weight: 700;
}

.figure-img {
width: 100%;
max-height: 650px;
object-fit: contain;
border-radius: 12px;
border: 1px solid #eee;
background: white;
}

.figure-footer {
margin-top: 10px;
font-size: 13px;
}

.figure-footer a {
color: #00876C;
font-weight: 700;
}

.table {
background: white;
border-radius: 10px;
overflow: hidden;
box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
}

.output-table {
width: 100%;
border-collapse: collapse;
margin-top: 15px;
background: white;
border-radius: 12px;
overflow: hidden;
box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
}

.output-table th {
background: #00876C;
color: white;
text-align: left;
padding: 12px;
}

.output-table td {
padding: 12px;
border-bottom: 1px solid #ececec;
}

.output-table tr:last-child td {
border-bottom: none;
}

pre {
background: #f4fbf8;
color: #111;
border-left: 5px solid #00876C;
padding: 16px;
border-radius: 12px;
max-height: 500px;
overflow-y: auto;
font-size: 13px;
line-height: 1.45;
font-family: Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace;
font-weight: 500;
text-shadow: none;
box-shadow: none;
-webkit-font-smoothing: auto;
text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
}

code {
color: #006b57;
text-shadow: none;
font-weight: 500;
}

@media (max-width: 1100px) {
.figure-grid {
grid-template-columns: 1fr;
}

.metric-grid {
grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
}
}
</style>


# Overview

```{r results='asis'}
analysis_mode <- res$run_params$analysis_mode %||% "NA"

analysis_label <- ifelse(
  analysis_mode == "pairwise",
  "pairwise differential expression analyses across multiple experimental groups",
  "a differential expression analysis"
)

cat(
  sprintf(
    "<p>This report summarizes %s performed with <strong>DEGgo</strong>.</p>",
    analysis_label
  )
)

cat('<div class="metric-grid">')

html_card("Analysis mode", analysis_mode)
html_card("Method", res$run_params$method %||% "NA")
html_card("Organism", res$run_params$organism %||% "NA")
html_card("DEGgo version", res$version %||% "development")

cat('</div>')

cat("<p><strong>Output directory:</strong><br>")
cat("<code>", outdir, "</code></p>")
```


# Sample metadata

```{r sample-metadata, results='asis'}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Locate reproducibility files
# ---------------------------------------------------------

outdir <- params$output_dir %||% res$output_dir
outdir <- normalizePath(outdir, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)

repro_dir <- file.path(outdir, "reproducibility")

metadata_file <- file.path(repro_dir, "clean_matched_metadata.tsv")
input_summary_file <- file.path(repro_dir, "clean_input_summary.tsv")

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Input summary
# ---------------------------------------------------------

if (file.exists(input_summary_file)) {
  
  input_summary <- read.delim(
    input_summary_file,
    sep = "\t",
    header = TRUE,
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  cat("<h3>Input summary</h3>")
  
  if (all(c("metric", "value") %in% colnames(input_summary))) {
    
    cat('<div class="metric-grid">')
    
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(input_summary))) {
      html_card(
        as.character(input_summary$metric[i]),
        as.character(input_summary$value[i])
      )
    }
    
    cat("</div>")
    
  } else {
    show_table(input_summary, n = nrow(input_summary))
  }
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Complete metadata table
# ---------------------------------------------------------

md2 <- NULL

if (file.exists(metadata_file)) {
  
  md2 <- read.delim(
    metadata_file,
    sep = "\t",
    header = TRUE,
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
} else if (!is.null(params$metadata)) {
  
  md2 <- as.data.frame(params$metadata, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
} else if (!is.null(res$metadata)) {
  
  md2 <- as.data.frame(res$metadata, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
} else if (!is.null(md)) {
  
  md2 <- as.data.frame(md, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

if (!is.null(md2) && nrow(md2) > 0 && ncol(md2) > 0) {
  
  colnames(md2) <- make.unique(trimws(colnames(md2)))
  
  # If row names were exported as the first unnamed column
  if (colnames(md2)[1] %in% c("", "X", "row.names", "Row.names")) {
    colnames(md2)[1] <- "sample"
  }
  
  # Remove fully empty columns
  keep_cols <- vapply(
    md2,
    function(x) any(!is.na(x) & trimws(as.character(x)) != ""),
    logical(1)
  )
  md2 <- md2[, keep_cols, drop = FALSE]
  
  # Add sample column if absent
  if (!"sample" %in% colnames(md2)) {
    rn <- rownames(md2)
    if (is.null(rn) || all(rn == as.character(seq_len(nrow(md2))))) {
      rn <- seq_len(nrow(md2))
    }
    md2 <- cbind(sample = rn, md2)
  }
  
  rownames(md2) <- NULL
  md2[] <- lapply(md2, as.character)
}
```


# Quality control 
## Sample quality assessment

```{r results='asis'}
qc_dir <- results$output_dirs$qc %||% find_first_dir(c(
  file.path(outdir, "pairwise_QC"),
  file.path(outdir, "single_QC"),
  file.path(outdir, "sample_QC")
))

qc_files <- find_png(qc_dir)

qc_files <- qc_files[
  grepl(
    "Sample_Correlation|Hierarchical_Clustering|QC_Flags|Library_Size|Detected_Genes",
    basename(qc_files)
  )
]

emit_gallery(qc_files)
```


## Principal Component Analysis (PCA)

```{r results='asis'}
pca_dir <- results$output_dirs$pca %||% find_first_dir(c(
  file.path(outdir, "pairwise_PCA"),
  file.path(outdir, "single_PCA"),
  file.path(outdir, "PCA"),
  file.path(outdir, "pca")
))

pca_files <- find_png(pca_dir)
emit_gallery(pca_files)
```




# Differential expression summary

```{r results='asis'}
if (!is.null(sumtab)) {
  
  s <- as.data.frame(sumtab)
  
  cat('<div class="metric-grid">')
  
  html_card("Comparisons", nrow(s))
  html_card("Significant DEGs", format(sum(s$significant, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ","))
  html_card("Upregulated", format(sum(s$up, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ","))
  html_card("Downregulated", format(sum(s$down, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ","))
  
  cat('</div>')
  
  show_table(s, n = nrow(s))
  
} else {
  
  cat("<p><em>No DEG summary available.</em></p>")
}
```

```{r}
if (!is.null(sumtab)) {
  
  s <- as.data.frame(sumtab)
  
  if (all(c("comparison", "up", "down") %in% colnames(s))) {
    
    plot_df <- rbind(
      data.frame(comparison = s$comparison, count = s$up, regulation = "Up"),
      data.frame(comparison = s$comparison, count = s$down, regulation = "Down")
    )
    
    ggplot2::ggplot(
      plot_df,
      ggplot2::aes(
        x = stats::reorder(comparison, count, FUN = sum),
        y = count,
        fill = regulation
      )
    ) +
      ggplot2::geom_col(width = 0.8) +
      ggplot2::coord_flip() +
      ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = c(Up = "#740001", Down = "#6497b1")) +
      ggplot2::labs(x = NULL, y = "Number of DEGs", fill = NULL) +
      ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
      ggplot2::theme(
        legend.position = "top",
        panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10)
      )
  }
}
```



## Volcano plots

```{r volcano-gallery, results='asis'}
volcano_files <- safe_list_png(
  file.path(outdir, "pairwise_volcano")
)

plot_gallery_grid(volcano_files)
```

## Heatmaps

```{r heatmap-gallery, results='asis'}
heatmap_files <- safe_list_png(
  file.path(outdir, "pairwise_heatmaps")
)

plot_gallery_grid(heatmap_files)
```


# Gene Ontology enrichment summary

```{r go-summary, results='asis'}
go_summary_file <- list.files(
  path = outdir,
  pattern = "merged\\.tsv$",
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

go_merged <- NULL

if (length(go_summary_file) > 0) {

  go_merged <- utils::read.delim(
    go_summary_file[1],
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  cat('<div class="metric-grid">')

  html_card("GO comparisons", length(unique(go_merged$comparison %||% NA)))
  html_card("Unique GO terms", length(unique(go_merged$ID %||% NA)))
  html_card("Enriched rows", format(nrow(go_merged), big.mark = ","))
  html_card(
    "Ontology",
    if ("ONTOLOGY" %in% colnames(go_merged)) unique(go_merged$ONTOLOGY)[1] else "BP"
  )

  cat("</div>")

  if ("comparison" %in% colnames(go_merged) && "ID" %in% colnames(go_merged)) {

    go_summary <- aggregate(
      ID ~ comparison,
      data = go_merged,
      FUN = length
    )

    colnames(go_summary) <- c("comparison", "enriched_GO_terms")

    cat("<h3>GO terms per comparison</h3>")
    show_table(go_summary, n = nrow(go_summary))
  }

  keep_cols <- intersect(
    c(
      "comparison",
      "Regulation",
      "ID",
      "Description",
      "GeneRatio",
      "BgRatio",
      "p.adjust",
      "qvalue",
      "Count"
    ),
    colnames(go_merged)
  )

  top_go <- go_merged[, keep_cols, drop = FALSE]

  if ("p.adjust" %in% colnames(top_go)) {
    top_go <- top_go[order(top_go$p.adjust), , drop = FALSE]
  }

  cat("<h3>Top enriched GO terms</h3>")
  show_table(top_go, n = 50)

} else {

  cat("<p><em>No merged GO summary file found.</em></p>")
}
```


## GO plots

```{r go-gallery, results='asis'}
go_files <- safe_list_png(
  file.path(outdir, "pairwise_GO")
)

plot_gallery_grid(go_files)
```


# Output files

```{r output-files, results='asis'}
output_items <- list.files(
  path = outdir,
  full.names = FALSE,
  recursive = FALSE
)

output_table <- data.frame(
  Folder = output_items,
  Content = describe_output(output_items),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

output_table <- output_table[order(output_table$Folder), ]

knitr::kable(
  output_table,
  align = c("l", "l"),
  caption = "DEGgo output structure"
)
```


# Reproducibility

```{r reproducibility, results='asis'}
repro_dir <- file.path(outdir, "reproducibility")

run_params <- file.path(repro_dir, "run_parameters.tsv")
# input_summary <- file.path(repro_dir, "clean_input_summary.tsv")
# 
if (file.exists(run_params)) {
  cat("## Run parameters\n\n")
  knitr::kable(read.delim(run_params, stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
}
# 
# if (file.exists(input_summary)) {
#   cat("\n\n## Clean input summary\n\n")
#   knitr::kable(read.delim(input_summary, stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
# }

session_file <- file.path(outdir, "sessionInfo.txt")

if (file.exists(session_file)) {
  cat("\n\n## Session info\n\n")
  cat("<details><summary>Show session info</summary><pre>")
  cat(paste(readLines(session_file), collapse = "\n"))
  cat("</pre></details>")
}
```
